name: 3D Desktop Pets
short_description: This is an application software for 3D desktop pets. It supports importing  most 3D format models, such as (VRM/FBX/OBJ/glTF2, etc.). Currently, users can only upload VRM files to support various basic actions, motion capture and cloning movements from uploaded videos.
detailed_description:
This is an application software for 3D desktop pets.

  • It supports importing  most 3D format models, such as (VRM/FBX/OBJ/glTF2, etc.).

  • Currently, users can only upload VRM files to support various basic actions, motion capture and cloning movements from uploaded videos.

  • It supports desktop special effects, such as the effects of rain, fireworks, mouse trails and so on.

    Disclaimer: Some of the models demonstrated can be downloaded from the Creative Workshop. The application does not come with the models demonstrated directly.

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
